vulnerabilities.title: bonding: annotate data-races around slave->last_rx
x86/vmware: Fix hypercall clobbers
riscv: trace: fix snapshot deadlock with sbi ecall
btrfs: reject new transactions if the fs is fully read-only
wifi: iwlwifi: Implement settime64 as stub for MVM/MLD PTP
crypto: virtio - Add spinlock protection with virtqueue notification
smb: client: split cached_fid bitfields to avoid shared-byte RMW races
hfs: ensure sb->s_fs_info is always cleaned up
bus: fsl-mc: fix use-after-free in driver_override_show()
crypto: iaa - Fix out-of-bounds index in find_empty_iaa_compression_mode
ksmbd: add chann_lock to protect ksmbd_chann_list xarray
ksmbd: fix infinite loop caused by next_smb2_rcv_hdr_off reset in error paths
scsi: qla2xxx: Free sp in error path to fix system crash
erofs: fix UAF issue for file-backed mounts w/ directio option
WordPress Oxygen theme <= 6.0.8 - Server Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability
Qemu-kvm: heap buffer out-of-bounds read in vmdk compressed grain parsing
Kata Container to Guest micro VM privilege escalation
LoongArch: Set correct protection_map[] for VM_NONE/VM_SHARED
drm/amd/pm: Disable MMIO access during SMU Mode 1 reset
scsi: target: iscsi: Fix use-after-free in iscsit_dec_conn_usage_count()
md: suspend array while updating raid_disks via sysfs
wifi: mac80211: don't WARN for connections on invalid channels
zlib before 1.3.2 allows CPU consumption via crc32_combine64 and crc32_combine_gen64 because x2nmodp can do right shifts within a loop that has no termination condition.
Libsoup: out-of-bounds read in libsoup handle_partial_get() leading to heap information disclosure
mruby JMPNOT-to-JMPIF Optimization vm.c mrb_vm_exec use after free
Limited path traversal when installing wheel archives
crypto: omap - Allocate OMAP_CRYPTO_FORCE_COPY scatterlists correctly
smb: server: fix leak of active_num_conn in ksmbd_tcp_new_connection()
xfs: fix UAF in xchk_btree_check_block_owner
scsi: qla2xxx: Delay module unload while fabric scan in progress
wifi: rtl8xxxu: fix slab-out-of-bounds in rtl8xxxu_sta_add
wifi: rtw88: Fix alignment fault in rtw_core_enable_beacon()
PCI: endpoint: Avoid creating sub-groups asynchronously
scsi: qla2xxx: Validate sp before freeing associated memory
nilfs2: Fix potential block overflow that cause system hang
drm/exynos: vidi: use ctx->lock to protect struct vidi_context member variables related to memory alloc/free
sched/mmcid: Don't assume CID is CPU owned on mode switch
